LegacyMigrationResult.sourceSignature: export interface LegacyMigrationResult { status: 'none' | 'imported' | 'already-current' | 'conflict'; sources: readonly string[]; message?: string; }

invocations.inputDescription: Standalone target and the two known Atomizer firmware directories.
invocations.outputDescription: Discriminated none, imported, already-current, or conflict result.

errors.description: Histories differ, are malformed, drifted, locked, or structurally unsafe.

invariants: Sources are never deleted or selected by recency.
Identical evidence is copied create-once and a durable consumed-hash marker prevents resurrection.
invocations.validationBoundary: src/core/legacy-migration.ts#migrateLegacyFirmwareState.migrateLegacyFirmwareState owns the exact declared call boundary; referenced runtime validators apply before untrusted values are used.
